creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2008-06-01 01:08:05 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    databases            Makefile 
  Added files:
    databases/pgfouine   Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    databases/pgfouine/files patch-pgfouine.php 
                             patch-pgfouine_vacuum.php 
  Log:
  pgFouine is a PostgreSQL log analyzer used to generate detailed reports
  from a PostgreSQL log file. pgFouine can help you to determine which
  queries you should optimize to speed up your PostgreSQL based
  application.
  
  WWW:  http://pgfouine.projects.postgresql.org/
  
  PR:             ports/123464
  Submitted by:   Pierre-Emmanuel Andre <pea at raveland.org>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.680     +1 -0      ports/databases/Makefile
  1.1       +38 -0     ports/databases/pgfouine/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/databases/pgfouine/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +11 -0     ports/databases/pgfouine/files/patch-pgfouine.php (new)
  1.1       +11 -0     ports/databases/pgfouine/files/patch-pgfouine_vacuum.php (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/databases/pgfouine/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +221 -0    ports/databases/pgfouine/pkg-plist (new)
